name: PA Senate Update
subject: Polling update: TIE
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
| **NEW QUINNIPIAC POLL: Pennsylvania 's Senate race is tied
Katie McGinty: 44
Pat Toomey: 45
[We have the momentum to surge ahead and defeat Pat Toomey. DONATE NOW >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/4489239026259197952/6958928938961731584?refcode=e20160511&refcode2=e20160511nd&amount=25)**
---
Friend, we had to be sure you didn't miss this: **A new public poll released this morning by Quinnipiac University shows our race is statistically TIED.**

Pat Toomey and his special interest allies have already spent six figures in false and misleading attack ads -- and Katie needs our help to raise the critical grassroots funds necessary to stay competitive and win in November.

**[We need your grassroots support TODAY to win what's now one of the most competitive Senate races in the country. Rush $5 or whatever you can so Katie can defeat Pat Toomey this fall. Every dollar counts!](https://act.myngp.com/el/4489239026259197952/6958928938961731584?refcode=e20160511&refcode2=e20160511nd&amount=25)**

We knew this race was going to be close. _NPR_ ranks Pat Toomey's Senate seat as one of the TOP FIVE most likely to flip this year. We need the strongest showing possible to prove that the polls are right and we have the grassroots power to defeat Toomey, end the GOP obstruction, and take back the Senate majority for Democrats.

**Make a donation to Katie 's grassroots campaign here:**

**[www.katiemcginty.com/PA-Senate-Tied](https://act.myngp.com/el/4489239026259197952/6958928938961731584?refcode=e20160511&refcode2=e20160511nd&amount=25)**

Thanks for your support,

Team Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4489239026259197952/6958928938961731584?refcode=e20160511&refcode2=e20160511nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/4489239026259197952/6886871344923803648).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: polls in FL, OH, PA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
You need to see this poll: | Friend --

You know how I feel about public polls -- they’re erratic and unreliable, especially when you look at a general election match-up this far from Election Day. But a new poll came out yesterday of three key battleground states, and I need you to see it:
> **Florida:** Clinton 43, Trump 42
> **Ohio:** Clinton 39, Trump 43
> **Pennsylvania:** Clinton 43, Trump 42
> _Source: Quinnipiac_
I can't say this enough times: These polls don't predict the future. We can change them by making sure voters know about Hillary's vision for our country. But we need to get started RIGHT NOW.

**Will you chip in to be one of the first to support our new Battleground Fund? (When you do, we’ll send you a free sticker so you can show off your support!) Your donation could be the difference in one of those key states on Election Day:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU0NTY2MDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNjEzNTY1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU0NTY2MDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNjEzNTY1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjU0NTY2MDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNjEzNTY1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU0NTY2MDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNjEzNTY1S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU0NTY2MDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNjEzNTY1S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU0NTY2MDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNjEzNTY1S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU0NTY2MDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNjEzNTY1S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU0NTY2MDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNjEzNTY1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Friend, this morning's Quinnipiac public poll shows **Katie locked in a dead-heat race against GOP incumbent Pat Toomey.**

We can win this race. But only if we have the critical grassroots resources necessary to stay competitive against Toomey's war chest and the special interest allies spending dark money on his behalf. They've already dropped nearly $1 MILLION on ads attacking Katie and misleading voters about Toomey's record -- and the general election only began a few weeks ago.

The path to taking back the Senate for Democrats cuts right through Pennsylvania. **To flip the Senate back to blue, we MUST elect Katie and defeat Pat Toomey. And to do that, Katie needs your support right now.**

[**Please, rush a donation today to help Katie surge ahead. Control of the Senate could come down to us.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7805585757439000576/2851927553776549888?refcode=e20160511.2&refcode2=e20160511.2nd&amount=25)

name: Alert (via Team Murphy)
subject: send Rick Scott a message:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160510a/?subsource=ngpattre160511)
---
| Friends -- In March, North Carolina passed a bill that discriminates against transgender people, banning them from using the restroom for the gender they identify with.
1. First, the Justice Department sent North Carolina and its governor Pat McCrory a letter, warning that the measure was illegal.
2. Then, North Carolina sued the Justice Department for interfering, but the Justice Department returned with a counter-suit, saying **the law is discriminatory and a violation of civil rights.**
3. Now, Gov. McCrory is calling on other states to join his lawsuit!

We can't let Florida join in. But what's Rick Scott's position on the issue? **He 's _refusing_ to say! **And now that a similar discriminatory law has been introduced in Florida, we need your help to tell him that all Americans deserve equal rights.

[**Will you add your name to tell Rick Scott to immediately come out AGAINST discriminatory laws like North Carolina 's?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae23e1/738133e4/35769a28/7f82571a/3016004694/VEsH/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160510a/?subsource=ngpattre160511")

Thanks for standing with us,

Team Murphy |
Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae23e1/738133e4/35769a28/7f82571b/3016004694/VEsE/ "http://murphyforflorida.com") This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae23e1/738133e4/35769a28/7f825714/3016004694/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Terrifying poll results re: Clinton v. Trump
body:
#
This is pretty scary, sisters and brothers. A trio of polls released yesterday showed Hillary Clinton in a very difficult spot against Donald Trump. She led by one in Florida and Pennsylvania, and actually trailed him by 4 percent in Ohio.
For months, Bernie Sanders has out-polled Hillary Clinton against Donald Trump, and often by extraordinarily large margins. **Because we must do everything we can to defeat Trumpin November, our mission is to win as many pledged delegates as we can between now and June 14.**
Then we're going to have a contested convention where the Democratic Party must decide if they want the candidate with the momentum who is best positioned to beat Trump, or if they are willing to roll the dice and court disaster simply to protect the status quo for the political and financial establishment of this country.
**But for our plan to work, we need to keep winning. And that 's why we ask:**
[**Can Bernie count on you to make a $3 contribution to help us continue our run of wins in Oregon and Kentucky next Tuesday? They 're important states and Bernie is campaigning hard, but the outcome is up to all of us.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-must-defeat-trump?refcode=em160511-s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-must-defeat-trump?refcode=em160511-s1-full")
Some people say we do better against Trump because we haven't faced the Republican attack machine yet. But we've been told our goals for the future are utopian, and that our plans would raise taxes on middle class families. We just never thought those attacks would come in a Democratic primary. Yet somehow we keep winning.
We are the best chance to defeat Trump because people united can never be defeated. That is why we must keep fighting.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-must-defeat-trump?refcode=em160511-s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-must-defeat-trump?refcode=em160511-s1-full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Rob Portman
subject: It's time for the House to act.
body:
| Peter -- Drug overdoses are now the leading cause of death in Ohio and addiction is tearing apart our communities. Yesterday, I wrote an op-ed in the Cincinnati Enquirer about my fight to end Ohio's heroin and prescription drug epidemic.

[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.cincinnati.com%2Fstory%2Fopinion%2Fcontributors%2F2016%2F05%2F10%2Fportman-house-must-go-further-heroin%2F84134090%2F&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=house_push&n=1)
Earlier this year, my bipartisan legislation providing support for Ohioans struggling with addiction passed the Senate by a vote of 94-1. The Comprehensive Addiction and Recovery Act (CARA) expands education and prevention efforts, helps law enforcement reverse overdoses to save lives, and expands treatment and recovery programs.

It's time for the House to act.

Learn more about my efforts and read my op-ed by [clicking here](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.cincinnati.com%2Fstory%2Fopinion%2Fcontributors%2F2016%2F05%2F10%2Fportman-house-must-go-further-heroin%2F84134090%2F&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=house_push&n=2). All best,
Rob Portman [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=house_push&n=3)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=house_push&n=4)[

](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=house_push&n=5)
---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=house_push&n=6). -=-=-

name: Team Katie
subject: RE: Sign Katie’s birthday card?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/2332866930555224064/-462440296991424512?refcode=e20160511.3&refcode2=e20160511.3&amount=25)
---
Friend -- Today is Katie's birthday! We didn't want you to miss this chance to sign the card that Katie's brother Rick and the rest of us at Team Katie are sending her.

**[Sign your name to Katie's birthday card and add your personal birthday wishes.](https://act.myngp.com/el/2332866930555224064/-390382702953496576?refcode=e20160511.3&refcode2=e20160511.3&ms=e20160511.3&amount=25)**

\-- Team Katie

_\---- Original Message ----
From: Rick McGinty
Subject: Sign Katie's birthday card?_

Friend,

Most people don't know that my sister Katie and I share a birthday -- and it's coming up tomorrow, May 11th.

Growing up with nine siblings, it was sometimes hard for our parents to make ends meet, and we weren't always fortunate enough to get birthday gifts. But whenever people asked me what I got for my birthday, I proudly told them: "My little sister!"

I was proud of Katie back then and I'm even prouder of her today, and of everything she's achieved since we were kids. And **[I don't mind sharing the birthday spotlight at all -- in fact, I'd love it if you signed my birthday card for Katie wishing her a special day:](https://act.myngp.com/el/2332866930555224064/-390382702953496576?refcode=e20160511.3&refcode2=e20160511.3&ms=e20160511.3&amount=25)** | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/2332866930555224064/-390382702953496576?refcode=e20160511.3&refcode2=e20160511.3&ms=e20160511.3&amount=25)
---

Katie and I didn't have much growing up in Philadelphia, but I'm grateful for the big, close-knit family we grew up in.

I've watched Katie's incredible journey -- from becoming the first person in our family to attend a four-year college, to creating jobs as a business leader, to serving as Governor Tom Wolf's chief of staff, she's accomplished so much. I know she'll make a great senator, just like she's made a great environmental advocate, business leader, and public servant.

**And for her birthday, I 'd love to send her best wishes from all of her grassroots supporters. [Will you sign my birthday card for Katie? I'm positive she'd love to hear from you.](https://act.myngp.com/el/2332866930555224064/-390382702953496576?refcode=e20160511.3&refcode2=e20160511.3&ms=e20160511.3&amount=25)**

Sincerely,

Rick McGinty
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2332866930555224064/-318325108915568640?refcode=e20160511.3&refcode2=e20160511.3&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/2332866930555224064/-534497891029352448).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

But whenever people asked me what I got for my birthday, I proudly told them: "My little sister!" I was proud of Katie back then and I'm even prouder of her today, and of everything she's achieved since we were kids. And | Katie and I didn't have much growing up in Philadelphia, but I'm grateful for the big, close-knit family we grew up in. I've watched Katie's incredible journey -- from becoming the first person in our family to attend a four-year college, to creating jobs as a business leader, to serving as Governor Tom Wolf's chief of staff, she's accomplished so much. I know she'll make a great senator, just like she's made a great environmental advocate, business leader, and public servant. And for her birthday, I 'd love to send her best wishes from all of her grassroots supporters. Sincerely, Rick McGinty | | | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate

name: Jared Small, EricGreitens.com
subject: Team Greitens needs you Saturday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,
Did you see the debate last night? Eric did a fantastic job, and was the clear winner. It once again showed that he is the only conservative outsider in this race, and the political insiders are all scared of our campaign.
We need your help to continue building on our momentum. This weekend, volunteers throughout the state are participating in our first **Super Saturday**. We're making calls to spread the word about Eric Greitens all day, from 9:00am to 9:00pm, at each of our field offices. Join us to help share the message of how a conservative outsider and Navy SEAL can shake-up Jefferson City.
I can't wait to see what Team Greitens accomplishes this Saturday. Let us know if you're coming by clicking one of the links below!
[RSVP in Springfield](http://links.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=gx1vmCW81pIdJ958zAabakVDzy2nY5C2rNUqMCS8al-2FsdA0647iVzVSA8-2Fc755JX-2BBocjLD30DGbS5YBRKc7oMMxlrpOq-2FLyVBuNWNh2eJ4Jn57j2Acdnri3kk6d9a7qW3-2Bqy5nI2E4XerCugzewPQ-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPY4BcT3MGRtpISZzi6ET23zuJCUad5HdzykPWc9DcxXNp4nZpeiYmPvRH4IT1BYpkOHWoS2MsgCE2y-2F0YSik9kigf01fkjSQLe2YLIhYXuoMf1d1hZzQ1ELgodkA5clu4qs0VjnBSr28aE2aH2cYteWFbQcEc8E-2BFD2XwbJbXyLYDWtBA-2BVKhDNn9rAl50yo-2BP-2FHa36MSUgOcpNj0fPYvcFYJfmo3OKZTU8n3Lhd-2BN1x5XsB-2F9dtdtJAkJo-2BX-2FOaE2uaYeX3hESVX7dty3Yq9jNMQvAuiE6DeJdBrgshh365qKpUq-2F8C2JIUnAaeRZm0bUQVinug3YKTZuaI2AV9LxIs2PcMbvCmEmHHAxrmiBc3jE4TUagSg0jiceyUhzabs-2BaIiQ-2BpbnhhU0cPtpyBS3f-2BFKhWFwRQ-2FC-2BMDK-2FJCh5N) This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjU0NjY2OTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNzg5ODYzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjU0NjY2OTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNzg5ODYzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=MjU0NjY2OTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNzg5ODYzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU0NjY2OTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNzg5ODYzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU0NjY2OTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNzg5ODYzS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU0NjY2OTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNzg5ODYzS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU0NjY2OTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNzg5ODYzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjU0NjY2OTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNzg5ODYzS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU0NjY2OTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNzg5ODYzS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
